params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a clock gating mechanism with D flip-flop control. It has inputs for a clock (CLK), enable (EN), and test enable (TE), along with a 32-bit data input (DATA). When EN is high and TE is low, it samples the DATA input on the falling edge of CLK. The ENCLK output reflects the CLK signal when EN is deasserted and TE is high; otherwise, it is driven HIGH.
